A professional website,
managed for you.

For consultants, coaches, and small organizations tired of choosing between $5,000 custom builds and DIY templates that never look quite right.

Now taking pilot clients for Q2 2026. Limited availability.

The Middle Ground

There's a gap between "too expensive" and "too frustrating."
We fill it.

DIY

$20–30/month

  • Wrestling with templates
  • Hours of your time
  • "Who do I call when it breaks?"
  • Looks like everyone else's
← You are here

Managed

$75/month · $0 upfront

  • Built for you by a pro
  • Unique to your brand
  • Real person answers the phone
  • Updates included monthly

Custom

$5,000+ upfront

  • Bespoke design & code
  • Weeks or months to complete
  • Ongoing vendor hunting
  • Great, if you have the budget

What's Included

Everything you need. Nothing you don't.

Custom-designed site

Built specifically for your brand, not a template.

Mobile responsive

Looks great on every device, automatically.

Your content, your voice

We work with your copy, photos, and style.

Fast, reliable hosting

Industry-standard infrastructure. No uptime surprises.

SSL & security

HTTPS, domain management, renewals — all handled.

Monthly updates included

Text changes, new headshots, quick tweaks. Just ask.

How It Works

Five steps. Two weeks. Zero headaches.

1

Discovery call

30 minutes. We learn about your business, audience, and goals.

2

We build it

You provide copy, photos, and brand direction. We handle the rest.

3

You review

One round of revisions to make sure it's exactly right.

4

Launch

Site goes live on your domain. Your monthly plan begins.

5

Maintain

We handle hosting, security, and updates month after month. Need a tweak? Just ask.

A Real Example

See what we built for Klara Farkas.

Live Site

Klara is an executive communication coach in Orange County with a decade of corporate experience at Yum! Brands and UCI's Paul Merage School. Her original website — built in 2014 — had become something she avoided linking to.

Two weeks later, she had a site that actually reflects the caliber of her work. Clean, mobile-friendly, and positioned to bring in new clients.

$0 Upfront cost
2 wks Discovery to launch
$75 Per month ongoing
View the live site →

Real client testimonial coming soon.

Is This for You?

You'll get the most from this if you're...

A solo consultant or coach who needs a credible web presence

A small nonprofit leader tired of patching an outdated site

A professional services firm (attorney, advisor, therapist) who wants clients to take you seriously online

Anyone who'd rather pay a monthly fee than manage a website themselves

Questions

The things everyone asks.

No long-term contract. Cancel anytime with 30 days notice. When you leave, we'll help you transition the site to another host if you want to keep it.

You do. The domain, the design, the content — all yours. We're your hosting and maintenance partner, not a platform you're locked into.

Your monthly plan covers one hour of updates per month — perfect for text tweaks, new photos, or small adjustments. Bigger projects (new sections, major redesigns, lead capture forms, integrations) are quoted separately.

Typically two weeks from discovery call to live site, assuming you can provide copy and photos promptly.

This program is designed for marketing sites — professional presence, lead generation, credibility. If you need a store, booking system, or complex app, that's a separate conversation (and Halliday does that work too, just under a different engagement model).

Get in touch — depending on the platform, we may be able to take over maintenance of your existing site instead of rebuilding.

have to think about?
